entries.title: Terminator Architecture
entries.summary: Process model, IPC contract, data model, terminal session lifecycle, extension system, state management, CSS token strategy, Task Vault architecture, and MergeFlow subsystem.

entries.title: Terminator README
entries.summary: Feature list, tech stack, prerequisites, quick start, npm scripts, keyboard shortcuts.

entries.title: Task Vault Extension README
entries.summary: Feature list, recurring tasks, task ID format (UUID, stable, STALE_ID on miss). MCP sidecar has been removed.

entries.title: Extension API Contract
entries.summary: Full surface of ExtensionAPI passed to activate(api) — all namespaces, method signatures, and version annotations. Also documents renderer-registry-only surfaces (WorkspaceTabRegistration, registerWorkspaceTab, activeWorkspaceTabId) added in v1.3.0. v1.4.0 adds settings.set, ipc.invokeChannel/sendChannel/onWindowEvent, pty namespace, window.broadcast. v1.5.0 adds db namespace (shared PGlite ExtensionDB), ipc.isRemoteAccessible, pty.listSessions/attachOnData/attachOnExit, notifications targets, and folder/action setting types.

entries.title: IPC Channels Contract (core)
entries.summary: Core IPC channel specifications: terminal:*, workspace:*, project:*, settings:*, dialog:*, extension:*, fs:*, notification.*.

entries.title: Extension Development Guide
entries.summary: How to build, test, and publish extensions. Extension API reference, CSS token contract, manifest schema. Covers global tabs vs workspace-scoped tabs (v1.3.0).

entries.title: Contributing Guide
entries.summary: Development workflow, npm scripts, test coverage requirements, PR checklist.

entries.title: Task Vault Data Model
entries.summary: SQLite-first entity model for tasks, projects, areas, recurrence, daily logs, inbox, and CalendarEvent. UUID v4 IDs. Supersedes markdown-file/filepath:line architecture.

entries.title: Notepad IPC Channels Contract
entries.summary: IPC surface for the terminator.notepad extension: notes.*, tags.*, comments.*, search.query, export/import. All handlers return { data } or { error }.

entries.title: ADR-017: Embedded HTTP Server for Remote Browser Access
entries.summary: Decision to embed Fastify HTTP+WebSocket server in Electron main process (via remote-control extension), exposed via ngrok. Bind address superseded by amendment (now 0.0.0.0 for mobile access). Covers security constraints and test coverage requirement.
